instruction:
In the comprehensive evaluation of the teaching process, let $U = \{ \text{clear and easy to understand}, \text{proficient with the teaching materials}, \text{lively and interesting}, \text{neat and clear blackboard writing} \}$, and $V = \{ \text{very good}, \text{good}, \text{average}, \text{poor} \}$. Suppose the evaluation matrix of a class of students for the teacher's teaching is:
$$
R = \begin{pmatrix}
0.4 & 0.5 & 0.1 & 0 \\
0.6 & 0.3 & 0.1 & 0 \\
0.1 & 0.2 & 0.6 & 0.1 \\
0.1 & 0.2 & 0.5 & 0.2
\end{pmatrix}
$$
If considering the weight $A = (0.5, 0.2, 0.2, 0.1)$, what is the comprehensive evaluation $\underset{\sim}{B}$ by the students for this teacher?

Options:
A. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 2 8, 0. 4 0, 0. 2 2, 0. 1 0 )$$
B. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 3 5, 0. 3 8, 0. 2 0, 0. 0 7 )$$
C. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 2 0, 0. 5 0, 0. 1 5, 0. 1 5 )$$
D. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 3 8, 0. 3 9, 0. 2 0, 0. 0 3 )$$
E. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 2 5, 0. 4 5, 0. 2 0, 0. 1 0 )$$
F. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 2 9, 0. 4 1, 0. 2 0, 0. 1 0 )$$
G. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 2 7, 0. 4 3, 0. 2 1, 0. 0 9 )$$
H. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 3 3, 0. 4 2, 0. 1 7, 0. 0 8 )$$
I. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 4 0, 0. 3 0, 0. 2 0, 0. 1 0 )$$
J. $$\underset{\sim}{B}=( 0. 3 0, 0. 3 5, 0. 2 5, 0. 1 0 )$$
